form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last over 600m at this track beaten 24 lengths (36.22) behind Bad And Bertha in a Grade 5 on March 29. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (34.76) beating Goldmine Fire in a Grade 5 on March 22. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Casino over 620m in 35.74. Followed that up with a minor placing over 600m at this track at Grade 5 two weeks ago. The form from the last run stacks up well. Worth including.
